{{CargoRelic
|name=Cuddly Bear
|class_id=20950
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=The simple-looking plush toy bear gives children endless joy and comfort, becoming a cherished memory of their childhood. The bear is like a little sun, for every minute they share hugging and playing together, it makes them feel the warmth and hope of life.
|fame=30
|art=18
|fth=14
|civ=16
|tech=12
|ss1=Per Partner you have, Snail ATK +1<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +1<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss2=Per Partner you have, Snail ATK +2<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +2<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss3=Per Partner you have, Snail ATK +3<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +3<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss4=Per Partner you have, Snail ATK +3<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +3<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss7=Per Partner you have, Snail ATK +3<br>Per Partner you have, Snail RUSH +3<br>Current Partners: 15/15<br> (Awakened)
}}
